productDisplayName: Nike Men Downshifter Black Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteEnjoy your runs in style with the nike Downshifter 4 MSL running shoe. Lightweight and stylish, this pair is worth the add in your wardrobe as it also doubles up as a perfect lifestyle footwear when teamed with jeans and t-shirts.  Product DetailsMesh upper with synthetic strips on the backfoot for breathability and structural comfortMeshed and padded tongue with a lace-up system for a snug Fit and comfortCushioned sockliner for in-step comfortSynthetic overlays with swooshes on the sides for enhanced shoe structurePhylon midsole for lightweight responsive cushioning and shock absorptionExternal heel counter to lock the foot in placeRubber shank for absolute midfoot support and torsional rigidity through midstanceForefoot flex grooves for smooth transitionHeel scoop for cushioned comfort and impact protectionWaffle patterned lugs in the TPR outsole with an impact guidance line and a scooped heelMaterial and CareMesh, syntheticWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
